ticket.title: GRANT WHITELABEL USERS ACCESS TO PARTNER SETTINGS TAB

test_cases.description: Verify whitelabel users can access and view the Partner Settings tab.
test_cases.expected_result: Whitelabel users should be able to view the Partner Settings tab.
test_cases.actual_result: Not yet tested - ticket on hold.

test_cases.description: Verify whitelabel users can edit/save partner settings where permitted.
test_cases.expected_result: Whitelabel users should be able to edit and save permitted settings.

test_cases.description: Verify non-whitelabel users' access to the tab is unaffected (regression).
test_cases.expected_result: Non-whitelabel users' existing access/behavior should remain unchanged.

test_cases.description: Verify access restrictions apply correctly for unauthorized whitelabel roles.
test_cases.expected_result: Unauthorized whitelabel roles should be correctly restricted from the tab.

test_cases.description: Verify Partner Settings tab renders correctly for whitelabel users on both web and mobile.
test_cases.expected_result: Tab should render correctly and consistently across web and mobile for whitelabel users.
